Description: "Update workspaceMembers schema definition to include email, status, and nullable userId"
Instruction: "Replace old workspaceMembers table schema definition with new schema including email, status, and role defaults."
ReplacementContent:
"export const workspaceMembers = pgTable(
  'workspace_members',
  {
    id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
    workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull().references(() => workspaces.id),
    userId: text('user_id'),
    email: text('email').notNull(),
    role: text('role').notNull().default('editor'),
    status: text('status').notNull().default('pending'),
    invitedAt: timestamp('invited_at').defaultNow(),
    joinedAt: timestamp('joined_at'),
  }
);"
TargetContent:
"export const workspaceMembers = pgTable(
  'workspace_members',
  {
    id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
    workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id')
      .notNull()
      .references(() => workspaces.id),
    userId: text('user_id').notNull(),
    role: text('role')
      .notNull()
      .default('member'),
    invitedAt: timestamp('invited_at').defaultNow(),
    joinedAt: timestamp('joined_at'),
  }
);"
